narrative:
Hamilton Twp C (precinct in Warren County) has 1,134 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
